channel.title: Android on 希希的博客
channel.description: Recent content in Android on 希希的博客

item.title: 安卓手机跳过Google开机向导设置
item.description: build.prop关闭开机引导（推荐） 打开TWRP终端 mount -o remount,rw /system #挂载 system 分区为读写 vi /system/build.prop #浏览build.prop #输入"i&quo

item.title: Android安卓手机VPN热点中继USB蓝牙网络共享
item.description: Android安卓手机root后授权VPN Hotspot可以实现VPN热点中继USB蓝牙网络共享，P.S. You can also do the similar on Windows, Mac, and iOS. I don’t know about you but
